purpose: Three fixed-reference, 15-second vertical jewelry director boards for Xiaoyunque.

boards.product_lock: Keep the wrapped gold ring, pearl cluster count, wire branches, and ring geometry unchanged.
boards.model_lock: Keep the same short-haired freckled adult model and blue linen shirt; ignore the existing earrings in the model reference.
boards.scene_lock: Keep the same ivy cafe terrace, marble table, cup, and warm afternoon light.

boards.product_lock: Keep the matched pair, oval gold loops, pearl cluster, wrapped-wire collar, shell discs, and proportions unchanged.
boards.model_lock: Keep the same short-haired freckled adult model; ignore the unrelated earrings already visible in the model reference.
boards.scene_lock: Keep the same olive and lemon courtyard, plaster wall, terracotta urn, and leaf-shadow direction.

boards.product_lock: Keep the exact gold chain, small pearl distribution, central drop pearl, material, and length unchanged.
boards.model_lock: Keep the same dark-skinned adult model, cropped hair, white linen shirt, and facial identity; ignore the necklace already visible in the model reference.
boards.scene_lock: Keep the same pool courtyard, green tile water, cream stone, lounge chair, and palm-shadow direction.
